message:
fix(ui): reorder footer HUD lanes and correct degradation cooldown test

Move the "view" HUD lane (breakpoint/density label) earlier in the
footer — immediately after "hits" — so the most useful at-a-glance
layout info appears before query/perf/runtime/scope lanes. This
improves scannability when the terminal is narrow and the footer
gets truncated. All 7 search-surface snapshots updated to reflect
the new lane order.

Also fix test_degradation_auto_upgrade: next_frame() checks
frames_since_change BEFORE its internal reset() call increments
the counter, so upgrade eligibility on the N-th call sees
frames_since_change = N-1. The test now correctly loops cooldown
times (not cooldown-1) and asserts SimpleBorders is held throughout,
then verifies the upgrade fires on the subsequent frame.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
